items.title: 2 Tariffic Microcaps To Check Out
items.description: CRWS and HBB have adjusted to tariffs and now appear undervalued.

items.title: Amazon Just Made a Major AI Announcement. Here's What It Means for Investors.
items.description: The AI race continues to heat up, and Amazon continues to invest in keeping its lead.

items.title: Trillion-Dollar Companies Now Go To 11; Google Is No. 3
items.description: Eli Lilly recently became the 11th stock with a trillion-dollar valuation. S&P 500 titans Nvidia and Apple lead, but Google is rising fast.

items.title: Instacart stock falls after Amazon plans ultrafast grocery delivery
items.description: Investing.com -- Instacart (NASDAQ:CART) stock fell 5% in after-hours trading Monday following reports that Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN) is developing a new ultrafast grocery delivery service that could directly compete with Instacart’s core business.

items.title: These e-commerce companies are gaining back 'tremendous' share
items.description: While Adobe Analytics expects consumers to spend a record $14.2 billion on Cyber Monday purchases, Shopify (SHOP) experienced an outage that disrupted online shopping and caused login issues for merchants around the world. Wedbush managing director of equity research Scott Devitt discusses the performance of e-commerce platforms and websites as the holiday shopping season kicks off. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.
